'''Boll Trinkatta''' was the [[Kloodavian]] founder of [[Trinkatta Starships]]. He supervised the company's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] factory on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] a short time before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Biography==
As the company began to flounder, Trinkatta was desperate for business and accepted a contract to install [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] in fifty [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class droid]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Installing hyperdrives into droid vehicles was highly illegal, but the need for profits forced Trinkatta to overlook the law. However, during the production, Trinkatta discovered that the starfighters were of [[Xi Char/Legends|Xi Charran]] design, denoting ties to the powerful [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. Trinkatta wanted to halt production after this revelation, but the arrival of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] complicated matters. Trinkatta's factory droids incapacitated Gallia, in order to cover up the illegal activity, but Trinkatta was still uneasy about the project.

When one of Trinkatta's [[Pilot/Legends|test pilots]] was killed during an operation, he tried to cancel the entire order. However, [[Bartokk]] assassins working for the Trade Federation kidnapped Trinkatta and reprogrammed his droids to continue the work of producing the specially-modified droid starfighters. Trinkatta was thrown into a secure cell while the production order went forward. Luckily for the businessman, a Jedi task force consisting of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Vel Ardox]], and [[Noro Zak]] came to Esseles and stopped the illegal operation, foiling the dastardly plot by the Trade Federation and its malevolent puppeteer, the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 1: Search for the Lost Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Episode I Adventures 2: The Bartokk Assassins]]''
*''[[Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul]]''
